title: Hardcore plus
description: Hardcore Plus is a Minecraft hardcore modpack designed to enhance the Hardcore experience without significantly altering vanilla features. It provides a more intense and challenging survival experience while staying true to classic Minecraft gameplay.
body:
The Hardcore plus is built to provide the most stable, consistent, and reliable foundation for Hardcore play — without artificially increasing difficulty or altering core survival mechanics. Instead of making the game harder, the goal is to make every Hardcore world as smooth, fair, and technically robust as possible.

This pack focuses on performance, world consistency, bug reduction, and gameplay clarity. By combining well-researched technical, optimization, and stability-oriented mods, it ensures that every Hardcore run is defined by your decisions — not by lag spikes, world hiccups, or unpredictable technical issues.

Hardcore plus is intentionally minimalistic. There are no gameplay overhauls, no difficulty boosters, and no intrusive features that alter the vanilla balance. You’re free to add whatever quality-of-life, visual, or personal mods you prefer — the pack exists purely as a clean, reliable backbone for long-term Hardcore survival.

Its lightweight structure makes updates fast and easy. Performance improvements, stability patches, and compatibility fixes can be applied rapidly, ensuring the pack stays relevant across new Minecraft versions with minimal delay.

Derivative Packs
You may use the configuration files from Hardcore plus in your own modpack as long as you clearly mention it in your description — a short note at the end is enough.
